reasoning: The base rate for winning a 64-player tournament is approximately 1.5%. Although Marius Gierse is an elite heads-up player (evidenced by his recent WCOOP win and WSOP online deep run), the tournament was already filmed in August 2025. Search results explicitly mention that the winner's name was leaked on prediction markets, yet the summaries of articles discussing Gierse's participation only detail his first-round matchup and bracket placement, without identifying him as the leaked winner. If he had won, searches for his name would almost certainly have surfaced the spoiler naming him as the champion. The absence of such confirmation, combined with the low base rate, suggests he is very unlikely to be the winner. I am assigning a minimum probability to comply with forecasting bounds.
batch_queries: Will Marius Gierse win the 2025 National Heads-Up Poker Championship?
